The Science

Research-Backed Methodology

Our assessments are built on decades of psychological research and validated frameworks

Behavioral Psychology

Grounded in cognitive-behavioral frameworks that examine how thoughts, feelings, and behaviors interconnect in communication.

Validated Metrics

Each assessment uses psychometrically validated scales with high reliability scores (α > 0.80) for accurate measurement.

Actionable Insights

Beyond diagnosis, each result provides specific, research-backed strategies for immediate improvement.

Social Intelligence

Incorporating emotional intelligence (EQ) and social cognition research to understand interpersonal dynamics.
